original_code:
module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input shift_left,
    input shift_right,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in; // Load new data
    end else if (shift_left) begin
        data_out <= {data_out[6:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left
    end else if (shift_right) begin
        data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]}; // Shift right
    end
end

endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input shift_left,
    input shift_right,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in; // Load new data
    end else if (shift_left) begin
        data_out <= {data_out[6:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left
    end else if (shift_right) begin
        data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]}; // Shift right
    end
end

endmodule
